name: Lumbar Palm Weave Pillow - Threshold™
description:
Infuse bohemian vibes into your decor with this Lumbar Palm Weave Pillow from Threshold™. This macrame rectangular pillow features a distinctive woven design in natural brown for rustic appeal. Crafted with a 100% cotton exterior and filled with 100% polyester, this throw pillow adds soft, cushioned comfort to your sofa, bed, bench or armchair.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
